BLOCKER_fixed_hours_not_enforced: loader enforces per-subject cap at WHOLE-RECORDING granularity -> at high N the tiny cap (0.05h) < one recording -> actual total hours BALLOONS (N=32:116h, N=1024:305h, N=2000:597h != 100h) -> 'fixed-hours' axis silently confounded with TOTAL hours. MUST FIX: window-level budget truncation (cap_windows=cap*120, truncate within recording).
MAJOR_sparse_exposure: N=2000 -> ~6 windows/subject (3 min); N=1024 -> ~12; likely too little for from-scratch encoder to learn per-subject structure -> high-N cells may be under-trained artifacts not diversity effects. Needs pretraining-convergence check per cell + possibly cap the high-N end.
compute_budget_ok: 15 runs from-scratch @100h corpus (pilot-scale); epochs TBD by convergence check
launch_note: v3 re-red-team FAILED condition #6: BL-9 total-data confound = the identifiability triangle T=N*e. Loader is correct + BL-4/5/6 resolved, but NO pretraining-scale design isolates pure subject diversity. RETURN TO PM for BL-9 (options A reframe / B depth-arm / C frontier). Launch HELD. Not auto-launched.
loader_fixed_hours_bug: FIXED (window-level budget; verified total ~100h all N; was 116-597h)
pm_decision_2026_07_08: BL-1 fix = TWO fixed-H0 lines (100h+200h) lean crossed grid; keep diversity question; NOT reframe; N=32 out of primary; constant-exposure arm = P2 diagnostic only
pending_before_launch: fresh design red-team of revised two-H0 protocol
pm_decision_v2_2026_07_08: BL-5=(ii) DROP exposure coeff+crossed regression, keep 3 within-pool matched-exposure NESTED pairs; MJ-6=(ii) descriptive slopes + leave-one-pair sign-stability, no off-diagonal cells
design_v3: matched-exposure subject-scaling pilot (narrowed; NOT full decomposition)
primary_statistic: Delta_subject_scale = unweighted_mean(Delta_A,Delta_B,Delta_C); Delta_pair = target_bAcc(high) - target_bAcc(low) at matched exposure; descriptive slope only; leave-one-pair sign-stable

launch_conditions.3_fixed_pretrain_val_pool: MET (n_val=64 per contrast, subset-seed invariant, disjoint)
launch_conditions.6_re_red_team_no_blocker: FAILED - BL-9 total-data confound (log N ⟂̸ log T within pair, corr=1)
launch_conditions.10_launch_p1_true: NO (held for re-red-team + explicit PM go)

v3_re_red_team: agent aafd6b5b: BLOCKER BL-9 (total-data confound) + identifiability triangle T=N*e. Loader verified correct; BL-4/5/6/MJ-8 resolved.

BL9_total_data_confound.issue: within each matched-exposure pair, cap_windows fixed + N doubles -> total windows double (A: 12032@100h vs 24064@200h); log N perfectly collinear with log total-data; Delta_pair cannot separate more-subjects from more-total-data
BL9_total_data_confound.root_cause: identifiability triangle T = N * e; varying N can hold at most one of {exposure, total} fixed; pure subject diversity (N up, e AND T fixed) is impossible since T=N*e
BL9_total_data_confound.same_as: v1 BL-1 unidentifiability, moved from (N,exposure) to (N,total-data)

PM_options.A_reframe_no_compute: rename to 'pool-doubling at matched depth (subjects+data jointly)'; strip diversity attribution; demote L1/L5 to co-varying; 18 runs as-is; NO diversity claim
PM_options.B_depth_control_arm: per pair add 200h/fixed-N_low/2*cap_windows cell; +9 runs (27 total); recovers (logN,log e) 2D -> subjects-vs-depth partials (but each partial still T-varying, not pure diversity)
PM_options.C_fixed_budget_frontier: pivot to single T=200h, N in {128,256,512,1024,2048}, e=T/N; ~15 runs; identifiable subject-vs-depth ALLOCATION frontier; deployment-relevant; abandons 'pure diversity' as fundamentally unidentifiable (S2P_07 option c)

other_open.MJ9_unweighted_mean_pools_heterogeneous: 3 Delta_pair separately-reported co-primary; B&C same population
other_open.MJ10_underpower: seed-SD ceiling 0.03 > MDE 0.02; per-pair CIs likely include 0; matched-final-val-loss covariate
other_open.MJ11_metadata_only_verification: add load-time exact-cap assertion (I fix once design set)

recommendation: C (fixed-budget subject-vs-depth frontier): after 3 rounds hitting the SAME triangle, 'pure subject diversity' is fundamentally unidentifiable at pretraining scale; the frontier is the clean, honest, deployment-relevant question. B if PM wants the subjects-vs-depth decomposition (2 partials). A = minimal salvage.
